title: Vintage Animal Paintings Pack
description: Adds 25 authentic 1890s zoological wall charts as new Minecraft paintings!
body: Discover the beauty of natural history with this Minecraft mod that brings 25 beautiful, high-resolution zoological wall charts from 1890 into your world! These historical illustrations are by the French artist Charles-Olivier de Penne (1831-1897) and were originally published by Hachette & Cie. in Paris. They served as educational teaching aids and feature detailed, colorful depictions of animals in a classic, scientifically aesthetic style of the late 19th century.
